connect.evaluationform.CfnAbout: Creates an evaluation form for the specified Amazon Connect instance.

connect.evaluationform.Description.Description: The description of the evaluation form.
connect.evaluationform.Description.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 0\. Maximum length of 1024\.

connect.evaluationform.InstanceArn.Description: The identifier of the Amazon Connect instance.

connect.evaluationform.Items.Description: Items that are part of the evaluation form. The total number of sections and questions must not exceed 100 each. Questions must be contained in a section.

connect.evaluationform.ScoringStrategy.Description: A scoring strategy of the evaluation form.

connect.evaluationform.Status.Description: The status of the evaluation form.

connect.evaluationform.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.

connect.evaluationform.Title.Description: A title of the evaluation form.
